Localization.Name: ReadyMeal (Vegetarian)
Localization.Description:
NDR: 60
Effects: None

The classic taste that's all you need, this Vegetarian option from ReadyMeal features a mixture of freshly picked vegetables in a citrus herb sauce all ready-to-eat in seconds.
